mapper.sql: id, dept_name as college_name, '' as college_code, 0 as dean_id, '' as contact_phone, '' as contact_email, '' as address, '' as intro, sort, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT id, dept_name as college_name, '' as college_code, 0 as dean_id, '' as contact_phone, '' as contact_email, '' as address, '' as intro, sort, status, create_time, update_time FROM sys_dept WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, dept_name as college_name, '' as college_code, 0 as dean_id, '' as contact_phone, '' as contact_email, '' as address, '' as intro, sort, status, create_time, update_time FROM sys_dept
AND dept_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{collegeName}, '%')
AND dept_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{collegeCode}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY sort ASC, create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_dept (dept_name, sort, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{collegeName}, #{sort}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM sys_dept WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, dept_name as college_name, '' as college_code, 0 as dean_id, '' as contact_phone, '' as contact_email, '' as address, '' as intro, sort, status, create_time, update_time FROM sys_dept WHERE dept_name = #{collegeName} LIMIT 1
